title: Image 3 of The Port Gibson herald, and correspondent (Port Gibson, Claiborne Co., Miss.), August 2, 1850
description: THE HERALD AND CORRESPONDENT FRIDAY AUGUST 2 1850 0 ElderT J Edmondson will preach at the Christian Church on Sunday morning at half past 10 oclock I O O F The R W Grand Lodge I O O F of the State of Mississippi closed its annual session at Natchez on Wednesday the 24th ult The attendance of representatives was very full and much business of importance was trans acted Cheering accounts of the prosperity and steady advancement of the Order were re ceived from all parts of the State and several applications for new Lodges were acted upon The following is the list of Officers of the Grand Lodge tor the current year M YV G Master W Crutcher Vicksburg R YV I G Master C S Magoun Natchez R YV G YVarden YV II Jacobs Port Gibson R YV G Secretary Jno B Dicks Natchez R YV G Treasr jxo R Stockman Natchez R YV G Chaplain Titos Rfed Natchez R W G ReDs J Barrows Jackson n W u ueps j w T Martin Natchez YV G Marshal N G Bryson Vicksburg YV G Conductor Chas Bussey Shongalo W G Guardian C Stietenroth Natchez Grand Encampment The
